login.title: Sign in

login.reset.hint: Enter your login. An administrator will be notified and set a new password.
login.reset.sentHint: If an account with this login exists, an administrator will see the request.
register.title: Register
register.pending: Registration received. Please wait for administrator approval.
auth.password.requirements: At least 8 characters, at least one letter and one digit, and must not match login.
settings.title: Settings
settings.notifications.telegram.chat_id_: 1) Open a chat with your bot in Telegram and send any message.
3) Copy result[*].message.chat.id and paste it into Chat ID.
settings.notifications.token_masked_hint: Saved token is hidden and shown only as a mask.
settings.notifications.status.label: Status:
settings.notifications.triggers.title: Settings
settings.notifications.triggers.types_hi: Which events to send via Telegram and MAX.
settings.notifications.triggers.col.name: Name
settings.notifications.triggers.debt_hin: Reminders about debt due dates and overdue.
settings.notifications.triggers.planned_: Notifications when planned transactions are activated.
settings.notifications.triggers.policy_h: How early to remind, how long to send after overdue, and when to run the daily check.
settings.notifications.triggers.negative: Append a message when the account balance is insufficient for an outgoing payment.
settings.notifications.triggers.budget_h: Notify when spending reaches a budget threshold (category or all expenses).
settings.notifications.triggers.password: Admin notifications for password reset requests.
settings.notifications.triggers.userRegi: Admin notifications for new user registrations.
settings.notifications.triggers.my_debt_: I owe: days to send after overdue
settings.notifications.triggers.owed_deb: Owed to me: start after overdue days
Owed to me: days to send after start
settings.notifications.policy.myDebtBefo: Start daily reminders this many days before the due date (0–30).
settings.notifications.policy.myDebtOver: How many days to send reminders after the due date (0–365).
settings.notifications.policy.owedDebtSt: Days after due date before reminders to the debtor start (0–365).
settings.notifications.policy.owedDebtOv: How many days to send after overdue reminders start (0–365).
settings.notifications.policy.creditDays: Remind this many days before the payment date (0–30).
settings.notifications.policy.disabled_s: Enable Debts, Credits, or Planned in settings to change the send time.
settings.notifications.triggers.send_tim: Scheduled notifications are sent daily at this user's local time ({timezone}).
settings.notifications.templates.title: Message templates
settings.notifications.templates.placeho: Click a placeholder to insert it at cursor position.
settings.notifications.templates.disable: Enable "{setting}" in settings to edit this template.
settings.notifications.error.days_range: Days value must be between 0 and 30.
settings.notifications.error.policy_rang: Check ranges: days before due 0..30, overdue days 0..365.
settings.notifications.error.time_format: Send time must be in HH:MM format (for example, 09:30).
settings.notifications.error.save_before: Save channel changes first, then send a test message.
settings.notifications.secret_missing.bo: Telegram and MAX tokens cannot be saved without an encryption key. Set a 32-character key in Admin → Notification encryption.
settings.timezone.hint: Type to search or pick from the list

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.accountsEmpty: Create your first account to track balances and transactions
transactions.field.timeHint: If omitted, current time will be used
transactions.field.plannedHint: A future date marks this as planned — balance won't change until then
transactions.confirm.delete: The transaction will be permanently deleted.
transactions.confirm.deleteTransfer: The transfer (both legs) will be permanently deleted.
recurring.title: Recurring operations
debts.title: Debts
debts.field.noBalanceHint: The debt won't be posted to an account or affect its balance
debts.error.cannotBorrow: Cannot borrow from someone you lent to — close the active "lent" debt first
debts.error.cannotLend: Cannot lend to someone you borrowed from — close the active "borrowed" debt first
debts.settle.title: Settle debt
debts.settle.skipBalanceHint: The debt is closed without posting to an account
debts.confirm.settle: The debt will be marked as settled.
debts.confirm.delete: The debt will be permanently deleted.
debts.error.noAccount: No active account for the transaction
credits.title: Credits
credits.col.name: Name
credits.field.name: Name
credits.field.downPaymentAffectsBalanceH: Disable if this payment was already made outside the app
credits.field.principalAffectsBalanceHin: The loan amount will be added to the debit account on the issue date
credits.field.principalAffectsBalancePas: Balance cannot be changed: the schedule includes a payment dated in the past
credits.schedule.title: Payment schedule
credits.schedule.editHint: Only unpaid scheduled payments can be changed
credits.error.manualIncomplete: Enter date and amount for each payment
credits.error.mortgageFields: Check mortgage fields: property price must be greater than down payment
credits.field.debitTimeHint: User local time in HH:MM format. If empty, auto debit is disabled for this credit.
credits.field.createTransactionsHint: Payments are debited automatically on payment date at the selected time
credits.field.retroactiveHint: Past payments count toward the credit; without «Debited from account» balance and stats stay unchanged
credits.field.retroactiveDebitHint: Mark the latest past payments that were actually debited from the payment account. Mark consecutive rows from the bottom up
credits.seed.title: First payments
credits.complete.title: Complete credit
credits.complete.skipBalanceHint: Remaining balance is cleared without debiting the account
credits.pay.title: Payment
credits.confirm.deletePayment: This payment will be removed from the schedule. The linked transaction will be deleted too.
credits.confirm.deleteAppliedPayment: This paid installment will be removed from the schedule and the linked transaction will be deleted. The credit may show an overdue payment afterward — check the schedule.
credits.schedule.appliedHint: Paid installments cannot be edited. You can delete them, but that may cause an overdue payment on the credit.
credits.confirm.delete: Delete credit and all related transactions?
credits.confirm.deleteKeep: Delete credit and keep transactions with a note?
credits.delete.title: Delete credit
import.title: Import & export
import.upload.hint: Drop Cubux CSV or XLSX here
import.error.format: Only CSV and XLSX are supported
import.mapping.title: Column mapping
import.mapping.hint: Map file columns to transaction fields. Type and date are required.
import.accounts.title: Map accounts
import.accounts.hint: Map unique account names from the file. All operations with the same name will use these rules automatically.
import.accounts.unique_note: Only unique accounts are shown ({count}), not every operation in the file.
import.accounts.hint_create_cash: Will be created as {type} — link to a bank account later in settings
import.categories.title: Map categories
import.categories.hint: Map unique category names from the file. All operations with the same name will use these rules automatically.
import.categories.unique_note: Only unique categories are shown ({count}), not every operation in the file.
import.subcategories.title: Map subcategories
import.subcategories.hint: If auto matching is disabled, map unique subcategories manually.
import.subcategories.unique_note: Only unique subcategories are shown ({count}), not every operation in the file.
import.subcategories.no_options: No suitable existing category selected for subcategory mapping
import.preview.title: Ready to import
import.preview.hint: Accounts and categories are mapped. Review the summary and start the import.
import.confirm.title: Confirm import
import.done.title: Import complete
import.job.title: Import in progress
import.job.hint: File "{file}" is being processed in background. You can stay on this page.
import.job.eta_unknown: ETA will appear once processing starts
import.export.title: Export to Cubux CSV
stats.title: Statistics
update.title: Update available
update.message: Version {version} is available. Back up your database and read the release notes before updating.
update.backup: Save a copy of data/buhgalter.db and the backups/ directory,
update.release_notes: Read the release notes on GitHub — they may include required migration steps.
errors.USER_PENDING_MODERATION: Your account is awaiting administrator approval
errors.USER_STATUS_TRANSITION: This status change is not allowed
errors.PASSWORD_TOO_SHORT: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.PASSWORD_TOO_WEAK: Password must contain at least one letter and one digit and must not match login
errors.PASSWORD_UNCHANGED: New password must be different from the current one
errors.ERR_DISPLAY_NAME_LENGTH: Display name must be at most 64 characters
errors.ERR_EXTERNAL_URL: external_url must start with http:// or https://
errors.ERR_EXTERNAL_ACCESS_DENIED: Access from this address is denied. Add the host to BUHGALTER_ALLOWED_HOSTS in .env or set external URL in admin for HTTPS via reverse proxy.
errors.ERR_SECRET_KEY_EMPTY: Notification secret key must not be empty
errors.ERR_CANNOT_DELETE_SELF: You cannot delete your own account
errors.ERR_CANNOT_CHANGE_OWN_STATUS: You cannot change your own status
errors.ERR_LANGUAGE: Language must be ru or en
errors.ERR_CURRENCY: Currency must be RUB, USD, or EUR
errors.ERR_THEME: Theme must be light or dark
errors.ERR_CHANNEL: Channel must be telegram or max
errors.ERR_GROUP_BY: group_by must be day, week, or month
errors.ERR_TRANSFER_DELETE: Cannot delete a single transfer leg
errors.CONFLICT_ACCOUNT_NAME: An account with this name already exists
errors.CONFLICT_CATEGORY_NAME: A category with this name already exists
errors.CONFLICT_SUBCATEGORY_NAME: A subcategory with this name already exists
errors.CONFLICT_DEBTOR_NAME: A debtor with this name already exists
errors.CONFLICT_DEBT_CANNOT_BORROW: Cannot borrow from someone you lent to — close the active lent debt first
errors.CONFLICT_DEBT_CANNOT_LEND: Cannot lend to someone you borrowed from — close the active borrowed debt first
errors.ERR_ACCOUNT_NAME_LENGTH: Account name must be 1 to 64 characters
errors.ERR_ACCOUNT_TYPE: Account type must be cash or bank
errors.ERR_ACCOUNT_BANK_REQUIRED: bank_id is required for bank accounts
errors.ERR_ACCOUNT_BANK_FORBIDDEN: bank_id is not allowed for cash accounts
errors.ERR_ACCOUNT_PRIMARY_ARCHIVED: Cannot set archived account as primary
errors.ERR_CREDIT_CARD_ARCHIVE_NOT_FULLY: Archive a credit card only when fully paid (balance equals limit)
errors.ERR_DEBT_DIRECTION: Direction must be lent or borrowed
errors.ERR_DEBT_ACCOUNT_REQUIRED: Account is required when balance is affected
errors.ERR_TX_TYPE: Transaction type must be income or expense
errors.ERR_BUDGET_DUPLICATE: A budget with this scope already exists for this month
errors.ERR_CATEGORY_TYPE_MISMATCH: Category type does not match transaction type
errors.ERR_SYSTEM_CATEGORY_PLANNED: System categories (credits, debts, etc.) cannot be planned
errors.ERR_CREDIT_CANNOT_REMOVE_RETRO: Cannot remove payment recorded at creation
errors.ERR_CREDIT_ONLY_LATEST_DELETE: Only the latest applied credit payment can be deleted
errors.ERR_CREDIT_INVALID_RETRO_DEBIT: Invalid number of retroactive payments to debit from account
errors.ERR_CREDIT_INVALID_MORTGAGE: Invalid mortgage fields (property price and down payment)
errors.CONFLICT_CREDIT_BANK_LOCKED: Credit bank can be changed only once
errors.ERR_CATEGORY_NAME_LENGTH: Category name must be 1 to 64 characters
errors.ERR_SUBCATEGORY_NAME_LENGTH: Subcategory name must be 1 to 64 characters
errors.ERR_SUBCATEGORY_SYSTEM: Cannot create subcategories for system category
errors.ERR_LINKED_TX_DELETE: Cannot delete the opening debt transaction while other debt operations exist — delete the debt instead

settings.tokens.perpetual_warning: This token never expires — that is RISKY. Revoke it if you no longer need it.

setup.login.label: Administrator login
setup.registration.title: Open registration
setup.registration.hint: Allow users to register without admin
setup.external_url.label: External URL
setup.external_url.hint: Required for public HTTPS access via nginx and notification links. While empty, localhost is always allowed; other hosts need BUHGALTER_ALLOWED_HOSTS in .env.
admin.system.registration.title: Open registration
admin.system.secret.title: Notification encryption (secret key)
admin.system.secret.hint: Exactly 32 characters. Set only here and stored in the database. Current value is never shown.
admin.system.secret.label: New key (32 characters)
admin.backups.restore.hint: Upload a .db file and type RESTORE to confirm.
settings.tokens.created.title: API token created
settings.tokens.created.hint: Copy the token now — it will not be shown again.
